Video.summary: Frankly my dear, guest star Richard Chamberlain gives it his all in "Gone With The Breeze".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Image.alt: Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford
Dick Chamberlain, Gloria Loring, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters & Tim Conway star in "As The Stomach Turns" spoofing "The Exorcist" in the process.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tonight's guests: Maggie Smith and Tim Conway!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Carol struggles with "Easy Open" packaging, Harvey & Tim spoof Jacques Cousteau, and Carol & Vicki are torn.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway breaks up Harvey in "The Dentist." Also: Carol looks to steal the show from a Broadway star.
Video.title: Ethel Merman, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guests John Davidson and Ross Martin appear in "The Helen Feibelbaum Story", a spoof of celebrity biopics.
Video.title: Ross Martin, John Davidson

Video.summary: Betty White plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates Mama's birthday.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell stars. Includes Harvey's proposal, Roddy & Carol working, and a spoof of "The Little Foxes."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Cass Elliot guests! Features a salute to Foreign Language films, and a sketch with puppies.
Video.title: Joel Grey, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Guest Shirley MacLaine joins Carol in sharing some of their fan mail.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley MacLaine

Video.summary: Maggie Smith returns to guest star as the erudite teacher of Eunice and Ed's son Bubba in "The Family."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Carol offers a trio of guests: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, and Nancy Wilson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Video.summary: Lucy and Carol play rival Rent-A-Car agents vying for Tim's business.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring
Lucille Ball, Tim Conway, Gloria Loring

Video.summary: Kaye Stevens and Audrey Meadows guest star, featuring "As The Stomach Turns" and the "10th Avenue Family."
Video.title: Kaye Stevens, Audrey Meadows

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests! Jim appears in a spoof of "Mary Hartman, Mary Hartman." Also: Tim tries to get some sleep.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Mel Torme and Martha Raye guest. Featuring Martha and Carol as dog-lovers, and spoofs of Disney classics.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Marty Feldman & Carol Channing guest. Features an airline crew who causes havoc, and wacky commercial spoofs.
Video.title: Marty Feldman, Carol Channing

Video.summary: Ken Berry stars, spoofing "Love In An Avalanche," which makes way for a more tropically based number.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: John Byner & Helen Reddy join Carol in a sketch about swingers. Also, The Family plays a game of "Sorry!"
Video.title: John Byner, Helen Reddy

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays the director of a play put on by the P.T.A., and a hitman hired to kill Carol's husband.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Tim Conway & The Pointer Sisters star! Sketches include "Up Your Income", and Tim as Nora Desmond's butler.
Video.title: Tim Conway, The Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Guests Art Carney and Nanette Fabray appear in "Guess What's Coming To Dinner?" and "Passion On 10th Avenue."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Art Carney

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds and Nanette Fabray join the gang for a series of Carol's patented commercial parodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Burt Reynolds

Video.summary: Phil Silvers & Jean Stapleton guest! Features "The Old Folks", commercial parodies, and a musical number.
Video.title: Phil Silvers, Jean Stapleton

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence plays an unsuccessful comic. Also: commercial spoofs; Tim at war, attempting to fire a cannon.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Bing Crosby and Rowan Martin guest! Bing's sketch is set in Brown Derby, while the "Laugh-In" boys are crooks.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Rowan & Martin

Video.summary: Comedian Alan King guest stars as Carol's distracted psychiatrist.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Alan King

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for a sketch where a betrothed couple elect to paint their future home-with messy results.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Steve Martin & Betty White catch a wave in the spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!". Also: Carol plays a bag lady.
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: Bing Crosby & Paul Lynde appear in "As The Stomach Turns." On "The Old Folks", Lynde joins the elderly duo.
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence & Paul Sand guest. Paul plays a man seeking confidence, and Steve joins "The Putrified Forest."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Paul Sand

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join for a blockbuster tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in "As The Stomach Turns." Q&A and a contest reveals stiff completion.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry and Totie Fields drop by to take part in "Carol & Sis" and "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Totie Fields

Video.summary: Features "Carol & Sis", where Harvey avoids Carol, and a take-off on "Back Street"..here called "Back Alley."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Diahann Carroll and Tim Conway star. Features singles out on the town, and "Arrivaderci Summertime."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Diahann Carroll

Video.summary: Jack Cassidy & Tim Conway star! Tim plays an orphan, then joins Jack and Carol for "The Story Of A Star."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Jack Cassidy

Video.summary: Step back in time with "The Family" as Eunice thinks back to her early days. Also, Tim plays a palace guard.
Video.title: Family Show
